title: Heartland Express, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
author: Na
description: Heartland Express, Inc. (Nasdaq: HTLD) announced its 92nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on July 6, 2026. The company estimates $1.6 million will be paid across approximately 78 million shares. Since implementing its dividend program in Q3 2003, Heartland Express has distributed a total of $564.5 million in cash dividends, including four special dividends.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's 92nd consecutive quarterly dividend demonstrates financial stability, consistent profitability, and strong commitment to shareholder returns. The ability to maintain regular dividend payments over 23 years indicates reliable cash generation and operational performance, which are positive indicators for investors.

title: Heartland Express, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
author: Na
description: Heartland Express (NASDAQ: HTLD) announced its 92nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on July 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 23, 2026. The company expects to distribute approximately $1.6 million across its ~78 million shares outstanding. Since implementing its dividend program in Q3 2003, Heartland Express has paid a total of $564.5 million in cash dividends, including four special dividends.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of its 92nd consecutive quarterly dividend demonstrates strong financial stability, consistent profitability, and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. The long track record of uninterrupted dividend payments since 2003 and cumulative distributions of $564.5 million indicate reliable cash generation and shareholder-friendly capital allocation policies.

title: Heartland Express, Inc. Announces Participation in Upcoming Conference
author: Na
description: Heartland Express announced that Chief Financial Officer Chris Strain will participate in the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation and Industrials Conference on May 19, 2026, in New York, including a panel discussion and investor meetings.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article announces routine corporate participation in an industry conference with investor meetings. This is standard business activity with no indication of positive or negative developments. The company continues normal operations as an irregular route truckload carrier.

title: Heartland Express, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
author: Michael J. Gerdin, Christopher A. Strain
description: Heartland Express announced a $0.02 per share quarterly cash dividend to be paid on January 7, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 26, 2025. This marks the company's 90th consecutive quarterly dividend, with total cash dividends reaching $561.4 million.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company has consistently paid quarterly dividends for 90 consecutive quarters, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to shareholder value

title: Heartland Express, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Heartland Express announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.02 per share, payable on October 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of September 23, 2025. This marks their 89th consecutive quarterly dividend, with total cash dividends reaching $559.9 million.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company demonstrates financial stability through consistent quarterly dividend payments and has a long track record of returning value to shareholders
